title: Inquiry concerning the processing of personal data relating to child users of the Instagram social networking service
summary: The DPC commenced this own-volition inquiry on 21 September 2020, based both on information provided by a third party, and in connection with processing identified by the DPC itself. The scope of inquiry concerned two types of processing carried out by Meta Platforms Ireland Limited (as the data controller of the personal data processed i...
